question: Will the 2026 NBA Finals go to a Game 7?
textDescription:
The 2026 NBA Finals is a best-of-seven series; Game 7 is played only if the series is tied 3-3 after six games. Historically about 20-25% of NBA Finals series reach Game 7.

Resolution

Resolves YES if the 2026 NBA Finals series reaches a seventh game (whether played, scheduled, or required by series score).

Resolves NO if the series ends in 4, 5, or 6 games.

Resolves N/A if the Finals are cancelled before completion.

NBA.com is the authoritative source.
